flags.message: Outcome leakage in the required provisioned input: record/context.json says forward and event.yaml says unresolved, but the 2026-07-13 snapshot expressly reports the May 11, 2026 judgment vacating and remanding the case and identifies a three-Justice dissent. I excluded that entry and the following judgment/mootness entries from the substantive analysis, but the cell is not blind and its prediction should be discounted.
